name: legal-ai-agent
description: 法務業務を肩代わりする AI Agent

scripts.dev:ai: cd apps/ai && uv run uvicorn src.main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000
scripts.lint:ai: cd apps/ai && uv run ruff check .
scripts.lint:ai:fix: cd apps/ai && uv run ruff check --fix .
scripts.eval:chat: cd apps/ai && uv run python -m evals.run --agent legal_chat
scripts.eval:research: cd apps/ai && uv run python -m evals.run --agent research_agent
scripts.eval:draft: cd apps/ai && uv run python -m evals.run --agent contract_draft
scripts.format:ai: cd apps/ai && uv run ruff format .
scripts.format:ai:check: cd apps/ai && uv run ruff format --check .
scripts.vscode:install-extensions: code --install-extension charliermarsh.ruff --install-extension dbaeumer.vscode-eslint --install-extension esbenp.prettier-vscode --install-extension ms-python.python --install-extension ms-python.vscode-pylance
scripts.langfuse:logs: docker compose --env-file .env -f docker/docker-compose.langfuse.yml logs -f langfuse-web langfuse-worker
